decoder.name: checkpoint-syslog-fields
decoder.order: vendor, product, version, eventId, description, severity

decoder.name: checkpoint-syslog-fields
decoder.regex: \scs4Label=Threat Prevention Rule ID cs4=(\.+)\s\w+=|\scs4Label=Threat Prevention Rule ID cs4=(\.+)\s|\tmalware_rule_id=(\.+)\t|#011malware_rule_id=(\.+)#011

decoder.name: checkpoint-syslog-fields
decoder.regex: \scs1Label=Threat Prevention Rule Name cs1=(\.+)\s\w+=|\scs1Label=Threat Prevention Rule Name cs1=(\.+)\s|\tmalware_rule_name=(\.+)\t|#011malware_rule_name=(\.+)#011

decoder.name: checkpoint-syslog-fields
decoder.regex: \scn1Label=Elapsed Time in Seconds cn1=(\.+)\s\w+=|\scn1Label=Elapsed Time in Seconds cn1=(\.+)\s|\telapsed=(\.+)\t|#011elapsed=(\.+)#011
